title: Aero Islands [for Create Aeronautics]
description: Sky island world generation from Isabel's Aeroscapes.
body:
![Aero Islands logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945f8674b7ee9dba824d1a021ad784757db75c0d_0.webp)
This mod replaces the default Minecraft world generation with gorgeous floating islands over the void!


## Features Along with the world generation, this mod contains a few key features that I think make the experience more fun and balanced:
Mod Features Aeroscapes World Generation > The floating islands, with all vanilla biomes and structures (except oceans and the structures that spawn there). > Three new biomes: Void Shores, Voidsea, and Deep Voidsea. These dangerous, barren biomes replace the world's oceans, and Trial Chambers and Strongholds generate there. > Rebalanced ore distribution to work perfectly with the worldgen & emphasize exploration, with ore spawn rates depending heavily on biome. Check the wiki for more info! Aerolite > A special stone type that generates everywhere and can be mined for aerolite twigs. Aerolite Twigs > You can mine these floating items from aerolite veins and eat them for a brief burst of levitation. Keep some on you for emergencies! Gilded Aerolite > In hot biomes, some aerolite will spawn with golden flecks and drop gold aerolite twigs. Aerolite Charm > Crafted with quartz, an ender pearl, and aerolite twigs, this special tool lets you teleport straight upward through solid blocks. Quickslate > A decorative block, crafted with aerolite twigs, which helps you run faster and jump higher. > Can be polished and chiseled into stairs, walls, and slabs. Music Discs > Two new original music discs, yaw and view, composed by [Elephants](https://elephants2.bandcamp.com/).
## Requirements Requires [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched). Requires [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) on NeoForge. ![Forest at sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb62192ef35e327d8c7771669a7ecfd6708671ec_0.webp) ## Official Modpack

If you're looking for a curated experience, check out [the modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/aeroscapes) that I built around this mod! It has tons of awesome content and polish, as well around 150 modded biomes, new crops, structures, immersion features, and more.

![Mangrove swamp at sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81324d0466f2d1ad2a7ec0a7f07109655794e3ac_0.webp) ![Snowy hills with aurora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7290aa242a755cdb86465b0e534eab3eb0df7cc8_0.webp) ## FAQ ❓Does this mod support Terralith, Nature's Spirit, BYG, or other biome mods? > Generally, yes! Though they should work out of the box, they will not have the special features I developed for this pack. To add them, check out the internal datapack's ["preset"](https://github.com/nuclearobelisk/aeroscapes/tree/generator-builtin/src/main/resources/data/aeroscapes/tags/worldgen/biome/modifiers) biome tags. If you add a custom data pack which adds the new biomes to those tags, they should get the right features automatically. If that sounds like a lot of effort, try the official modpack! ❓Can I use this in my modpack? > Definitely! ❓How do I report issues? > Use the issue tracker on GitHub, linked in the sidebar. ❓Other mods' structures are spawning in the void when I use this pack :( > You can work around this using Lithostitched and a custom data pack. Check out [this part](https://github.com/nuclearobelisk/aeroscapes/tree/generator-builtin/src/main/resources/data/minecraft/worldgen/structure) of the internal data pack for an example. ❓I keep getting bad spawns! > Try Serilum's Village Spawn Point mod, linked in the recommended mod section below. ![Desert town](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a34ac5e11526272dff9e644754923b7d3a753b7_0.webp) ## Also Check Out... On its own, this mod presents a challenging experience, and is fully balanced for survival. Here's a list of some specific mods that I recommend running it with for the best experience possible:
Recommended Mods - [Smooth Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-skies) - [Clear Void](https://modrinth.com/mod/clear-void) - [Village Spawn Point](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-spawn-point) - [Gliders](https://modrinth.com/mod/gliders) - [Grappling Hook Mod: Skybound](https://modrinth.com/mod/grapplemod-skybound) - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - [Create: Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
I've been tinkering with this world generator for around four years. It's a labor of love for me, and I'm so grateful to everyone who has shown interest in the mod so far. I hope you enjoy it too! 🖤 Screenshots on this page were taken ingame with [Complementary: Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shaders (with Unbound clouds enabled) and the [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) resource pack. No AI was used to create this mod. You can find my other work on [itch.io](https://nuclearobelisk.itch.io/). Love ya!
